segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Hi, welcome in. First time here?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Yeah, I'm new in the area and wanted to ask about membership options.

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Sure. We have monthly memberships and day passes.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Could I start with a day pass today and decide later?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Absolutely. It's twenty dollars for the day.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Sounds good. Do you provide towels, or should I bring my own?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Bring your own for now, unless you add towel service.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Got it. Where are the lockers and showers?

segments.speaker: Staff
segments.text: Locker rooms are down the hall on your left. Bring your own lock.

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Okay. And what time do you usually close on weekdays?

segments.speaker: You
segments.text: Perfect. I'll do the day pass today.
